hero.title: Direct Sourcing from India.
hero.desc: We connect international buyers directly with verified Indian manufacturers. Transparent pricing. Quality verified against agreed specifications.

products.sectionSubtitle: Three core commodity categories. Sourced from verified Indian manufacturers and processors. Supplied to your specification.
products.feedDesc: High-protein de-oiled cakes for compound animal feed. Rapeseed Meal, Soybean Meal, DORB — sourced from established Indian solvent-extraction mills.
products.mineralsDesc: High-grade Quartz and Feldspar from Rajasthan mines and beneficiation facilities. For ceramics, glass, paints, and industrial applications.
products.agroDesc: Sesame Seeds, Cumin, Psyllium Husk, Coriander, Moringa — cleaned, sorted and graded from Gujarat and Rajasthan growing regions.
products.heroDesc: Feed Ingredients, Industrial Minerals, and Agro Commodities — sourced from verified Indian manufacturers. Minimum 1 FCL. FOB & CIF.
products.specNotice: All specifications are indicative ranges for trade enquiry only. Final specifications confirmed in the written commercial offer.
products.cat1Subtitle: High-protein de-oiled cakes from established Indian solvent-extraction mills. For poultry, livestock, and aquaculture feed formulations.
products.cat2Subtitle: High-grade minerals from Rajasthan mines and beneficiation facilities. Ceramics, glass, paints, drilling, and specialty industrial applications.
products.cat3Subtitle: Premium agricultural commodities from Gujarat and Rajasthan growing regions. Cleaned, sorted, and graded to buyer specification.
products.ctaDesc: We source a wide range of Indian agro, feed, and mineral commodities beyond this listing. Share your requirement and we'll advise on availability.

facts.leadSub: Subject to product availability and port schedules
facts.paymentSub: Negotiable basis buyer profile and order history
facts.qaSub: Geochem & SGS accepted — buyer arranges & bears cost

why.sectionSubtitle: We don't chase small orders or easy margins. We build supply relationships that last.
why.card1Desc: You deal directly with the source. No layers, no markup inflation. Better pricing, faster decisions.
why.card2Desc: Products shipped to mutually agreed specifications. Geochem & SGS inspection accepted — buyer arranges and bears cost. Test reports and certificates provided.
why.card3Desc: Complete documentation — Phytosanitary, COO, BL, Invoice, Packing List. Your customs team gets everything they need.
why.card4Desc: Pricing disclosed at quotation stage. FOB and CIF only — clean, clear, no surprises.

industries.card1Desc: Poultry, livestock, aquaculture, and compound feed manufacturers requiring consistent high-protein meal supply.
industries.card2Desc: Industrial minerals — Quartz and Feldspar — for tile, sanitaryware, glass, and frits manufacturing.
industries.card3Desc: Cumin, Sesame, Coriander for food manufacturers, spice blenders, and retail packing operations.
industries.card4Desc: Psyllium Husk, Moringa, and specialty agro commodities for supplement and pharmaceutical formulation.
industries.card5Desc: Quartz powder and industrial minerals as fillers and extenders in paint and surface coating applications.
industries.card6Desc: International traders and regional distributors seeking a reliable, consistent origin-country supply partner.

cta.homeDesc: Share your product, quantity, and destination port. We respond with specifications, indicative pricing, and availability — within 1 business day.

about.body1: VP TRADELINK is a Gujarat-based international commodity sourcing and export company established in 2019. We specialize in Feed Ingredients, Industrial Minerals, and Agro Commodities — sourcing from verified Indian manufacturers and processors and supplying to international buyers across Asia, the Middle East, Africa, and Europe.
about.body2: We operate through Mundra (INMUN) and Kandla (INIXY) ports. Our inquiry-to-response time is within 1 business day (Monday to Friday, IST). Third-party inspection by Geochem and SGS is accepted on all shipments — arranged and borne by the buyer. We supply exclusively on FOB and CIF terms, with payment via LC, TT advance, or CAD based on buyer profile.
about.body3: We are an IEC-registered exporter under DGFT, Gujarat. Our approach is direct, transparent, and focused on building long-term supply relationships.

howwework.step1Desc: Share your product, specification, quantity, and destination port. Email or inquiry form — we respond within 1 business day (Mon–Fri, IST).
howwework.step2Desc: We send a formal offer: product spec sheet, FOB/CIF price, MOQ, lead time, payment terms, and available inspection options.
howwework.step3Desc: On agreement, we issue a Sales Contract or Proforma Invoice. Payment terms confirmed. Production or sourcing begins.
howwework.step4Desc: Product is sourced, processed, and packed to your specification. Third-party inspection (Geochem/SGS) arranged if required — at buyer's cost.
howwework.step5Desc: Cargo loaded at Mundra or Kandla. Full document set dispatched: BL, Invoice, Packing List, COO, Phytosanitary Certificate, COA.
howwework.step6Desc: Vessel tracking shared. Documents couriered or sent via bank (LC). Post-shipment support provided for any documentation queries.
howwework.heroDesc: A straightforward 6-step process — from your first inquiry to cargo delivery at your port.

contact.heroDesc: Share your product requirement and commercial details. We respond within 1 business day (Mon–Fri, IST) with product options, specifications, and pricing.
contact.msgPlaceholder: Specification requirements, packaging preferences, delivery port, or any other details...
contact.responseNote: We respond within 1 business day, Monday to Friday (IST). Our response includes product availability, indicative specification, and preliminary pricing — not a generic acknowledgement.

markets.sectionSubtitle: We actively support buyer sourcing requirements across Asia, Middle East, Africa, and Europe. Don't see your country? We ship to most major ports worldwide.
